# arclo

> AI-native design system for React. 20 components that don't exist in MUI, Tailwind, Radix, or shadcn/ui.

Built on Radix conventions. Works with shadcn/ui. TypeScript + Tailwind CSS. 6 color themes. Light + dark mode.

## Install

```
npm install @arc-lo/ui
```

Peer dependencies: react >=18, react-dom >=18, tailwindcss >=4

## Setup

```css
@import "tailwindcss";
@import "@arc-lo/ui/styles.css";
```

That's it — theme variables, dark mode, and Tailwind utility scanning are all included.

## Theming

6 built-in color themes: noir (default/black), violet, ocean, forest, sunset, rose.

```html
<html data-theme="violet">
```

Or override CSS variables directly:

```css
:root {
  --arclo-accent: #6C5CE7;
  --arclo-accent-hover: #5A4BD1;
  --arclo-accent-fg: #ffffff;
  --arclo-surface: #ffffff;
  --arclo-surface-secondary: #f9fafb;
  --arclo-border: #e5e7eb;
  --arclo-text: #1a1a1a;
  --arclo-text-secondary: #6b7280;
  --arclo-text-muted: #9ca3af;
}
```

Dark mode: add `.dark` class to html or use `prefers-color-scheme: dark` (automatic).

## Components

### StreamingText

Token-by-token text rendering with 6 lifecycle states.

```tsx
import { StreamingText } from "@arc-lo/ui";

<StreamingText.Root text={text} speed={30} chunkSize="char">
  <StreamingText.Skeleton lines={3} />
  <StreamingText.Content />
  <StreamingText.Cursor />
  <StreamingText.Stop />
  <StreamingText.ErrorFallback message="Something went wrong." />
  <StreamingText.Toolbar>{/* buttons */}</StreamingText.Toolbar>
</StreamingText.Root>
```

States: pending, streaming, done, interrupted, error, ratelimit.

Root props:
- text: string — text to stream
- speed: number (default 30) — ms between chunks
- chunkSize: "char" | "word" | "line" (default "char")
- onDone: () => void

Hook: `useStreamingText({ text, speed, chunkSize, onDone })` returns `{ displayedText, fullText, state, interrupt, reset }`.

### PromptBox

AI prompt input with auto-growing textarea, context chips, and suggestions.

```tsx
import { PromptBox } from "@arc-lo/ui";

<PromptBox.Root onSubmit={(value) => send(value)} isSubmitting={loading}>
  <PromptBox.Chips>
    <PromptBox.Chip onRemove={() => remove()}>GPT-4</PromptBox.Chip>
  </PromptBox.Chips>
  <PromptBox.Input placeholder="Ask anything..." />
  <PromptBox.Suggestions suggestions={["Summarize", "Explain"]} />
  <PromptBox.Footer>
    <PromptBox.SubmitButton />
  </PromptBox.Footer>
</PromptBox.Root>
```

Root props:
- value: string (controlled)
- defaultValue: string
- onSubmit: (value: string) => void
- onValueChange: (value: string) => void
- isSubmitting: boolean
- disabled: boolean

Enter submits. Shift+Enter adds newline. Textarea auto-grows.

### ConfidenceBadge

Visual indicator for AI confidence levels.

```tsx
import { ConfidenceBadge } from "@arc-lo/ui";

<ConfidenceBadge level="high" />
<ConfidenceBadge level="medium" variant="dot" />
<ConfidenceBadge level="low" variant="inline" />
```

Props:
- level: "high" | "medium" | "low" | "unknown" (required)
- variant: "badge" | "dot" | "inline" (default "badge")
- label: string (custom label override)

### FeedbackBar

Response action toolbar — thumbs, copy, regenerate.

```tsx
import { FeedbackBar } from "@arc-lo/ui";

<FeedbackBar.Root onFeedback={(value) => track(value)}>
  <FeedbackBar.ThumbsUp />
  <FeedbackBar.ThumbsDown />
  <FeedbackBar.Copy text={responseText} />
  <FeedbackBar.Regenerate onRegenerate={() => regen()} />
</FeedbackBar.Root>
```

Root props:
- onFeedback: (value: "up" | "down" | null) => void

### CitationInline

Inline source attribution with hover preview.

```tsx
import { CitationInline, CitationGroup } from "@arc-lo/ui";

<CitationInline index={1} href="https://example.com" sourceTitle="Source" preview="Preview text..." />
<CitationInline index={2} variant="bracket" />
<CitationInline index={3} variant="pill" />

<CitationGroup>
  <CitationInline index={1} />
  <CitationInline index={2} />
</CitationGroup>
```

Props:
- index: number (required)
- href: string
- sourceTitle: string
- preview: ReactNode
- variant: "superscript" | "bracket" | "pill" (default "superscript")

### RefusalCard

Graceful declined request handling with alternatives.

```tsx
import { RefusalCard } from "@arc-lo/ui";

<RefusalCard
  type="safety"
  reason="I can't help with that."
  suggestions={["Try this instead", "Or ask about this"]}
  onSuggestionClick={(s) => submitPrompt(s)}
/>
```

Types: safety (red), capability (amber), policy (orange), context (blue).

### ThinkingBlock

Collapsible chain-of-thought reasoning display.

```tsx
import { ThinkingBlock } from "@arc-lo/ui";

<ThinkingBlock.Root state="thinking" duration={3} collapseOnDone>
  <ThinkingBlock.Trigger>Reasoning</ThinkingBlock.Trigger>
  <ThinkingBlock.Content>
    <p>Analyzing the problem step by step...</p>
  </ThinkingBlock.Content>
</ThinkingBlock.Root>
```

States: thinking, done.

Root props:
- state: "thinking" | "done"
- duration: number — seconds spent thinking (shown in done state)
- collapseOnDone: boolean — auto-collapse when done
- defaultOpen: boolean

### ToolCall

Tool invocation display with status, inputs, and outputs.

```tsx
import { ToolCall } from "@arc-lo/ui";

<ToolCall.Root toolName="search_web" status="success" defaultOpen>
  <ToolCall.Header />
  <ToolCall.Input>{JSON.stringify(params, null, 2)}</ToolCall.Input>
  <ToolCall.Output>{JSON.stringify(result, null, 2)}</ToolCall.Output>
</ToolCall.Root>
```

Statuses: pending, running, success, error.

### MarkdownRenderer

Streaming-aware markdown rendering.

```tsx
import { MarkdownRenderer } from "@arc-lo/ui";

<MarkdownRenderer content={markdownText} />
```

Supports headings, paragraphs, lists, code blocks, links, blockquotes, bold, italic.

### StatusIndicator

Animated AI status label with letter-by-letter light sweep.

```tsx
import { StatusIndicator } from "@arc-lo/ui";

<StatusIndicator state="thinking" />
<StatusIndicator state="streaming" label="Writing..." />
<StatusIndicator state="tool-calling" />
```

States: idle, thinking, streaming, tool-calling, error.

Props:
- state: StatusIndicatorState
- label: string (auto-generated from state)
- animation: "sweep" | "pulse" (default "sweep")

### TokenUsage

Visual token and cost meter.

```tsx
import { TokenUsage } from "@arc-lo/ui";

<TokenUsage
  inputTokens={1500}
  outputTokens={800}
  maxTokens={4096}
  cost={0.0045}
/>
```

### ModelSelector

Dropdown selector for AI models.

```tsx
import { ModelSelector } from "@arc-lo/ui";

<ModelSelector
  models={[
    { id: "claude-sonnet", name: "Claude Sonnet", badge: "Fast" },
    { id: "claude-opus", name: "Claude Opus", badge: "New" },
  ]}
  value={selected}
  onChange={setSelected}
/>
```

### SourceCard

RAG retrieval result card with relevance scoring.

```tsx
import { SourceCard } from "@arc-lo/ui";

<SourceCard
  title="Attention Is All You Need"
  url="https://arxiv.org/abs/1706.03762"
  content="We propose a new architecture..."
  relevance={0.95}
  variant="compact"
/>
```

### ChatThread

Conversation container with user, assistant, and system messages.

```tsx
import { ChatThread } from "@arc-lo/ui";

<ChatThread.Root className="h-[500px]">
  <ChatThread.Messages>
    <ChatThread.SystemMessage>Today's conversation</ChatThread.SystemMessage>
    <ChatThread.UserMessage name="You" avatar={<Avatar />}>
      Hello!
    </ChatThread.UserMessage>
    <ChatThread.AssistantMessage name="Claude" avatar={<Avatar />}>
      Hi! How can I help?
    </ChatThread.AssistantMessage>
    <ChatThread.ScrollAnchor />
  </ChatThread.Messages>
</ChatThread.Root>
```

### FileAttachment

File preview chips and cards with type icons and upload progress.

```tsx
import { FileAttachment } from "@arc-lo/ui";

<FileAttachment
  name="report.pdf"
  size="2.4 MB"
  type="pdf"
  progress={75}
  onRemove={() => remove()}
/>
```

### CodeBlock

Code display with copy button, line numbers, and language badge.

```tsx
import { CodeBlock } from "@arc-lo/ui";

<CodeBlock code={codeString} language="typescript" showLineNumbers />
```

### ConversationBranch

Branch navigation for regenerated responses.

```tsx
import { ConversationBranch } from "@arc-lo/ui";

<ConversationBranch
  current={2}
  total={3}
  onPrevious={() => prev()}
  onNext={() => next()}
/>
```

### SuggestTopics

Starter prompt cards for empty chat states.

```tsx
import { SuggestTopics, TopicCard } from "@arc-lo/ui";

<SuggestTopics columns={2}>
  <TopicCard
    icon="✍️"
    title="Write a blog post"
    description="About AI design systems"
    onSelect={(title) => setPrompt(title)}
  />
</SuggestTopics>

<SuggestTopics variant="compact">
  <TopicCard variant="compact" icon="🔍" title="Research" onSelect={handle} />
</SuggestTopics>
```

### ImageGen

Image generation with blur reveal, progress bar, and 5 states.

```tsx
import { ImageGen } from "@arc-lo/ui";

<ImageGen.Root
  state="generating"
  src={imageUrl}
  alt="Generated landscape"
  aspectRatio="1/1"
  blurReveal
  onRetry={() => retry()}
  onDownload={() => download()}
>
  <ImageGen.Placeholder />
  <ImageGen.Preview />
  <ImageGen.Progress progress={65} />
  <ImageGen.Overlay />
  <ImageGen.ErrorFallback message="Generation failed." />
  <ImageGen.Toolbar>
    <ImageGen.Download />
    <ImageGen.Retry />
  </ImageGen.Toolbar>
</ImageGen.Root>
```

States: idle, pending, generating, done, error.

### VideoGen

Video generation with stages, progress, player, and 6 states.

```tsx
import { VideoGen } from "@arc-lo/ui";

<VideoGen.Root
  state="rendering"
  poster={thumbnailUrl}
  src={videoUrl}
  progress={78}
  aspectRatio="16/9"
  onRetry={() => retry()}
  onPlay={() => play()}
>
  <VideoGen.Placeholder />
  <VideoGen.Thumbnail />
  <VideoGen.Player />
  <VideoGen.Progress />
  <VideoGen.StageLabel />
  <VideoGen.PlayButton />
  <VideoGen.ErrorFallback message="Generation failed." />
  <VideoGen.Toolbar />
</VideoGen.Root>
```

States: idle, queued, processing, rendering, done, error.

## Architecture

All compound components follow Radix patterns:
- Root provides context via React Context
- Child parts consume context and render conditionally based on state
- All parts accept className for Tailwind customization
- All parts forward refs
- data-state attributes on Root for CSS targeting
- All colors use CSS custom properties (--arclo-*) — theme-aware for light/dark

## Links

- Docs: https://arc-lo.com/docs
- GitHub: https://github.com/arc-lo/ui
- npm: https://www.npmjs.com/package/@arc-lo/ui
